case_title: MEREL P GLAUBIGER VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED NOV-22-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-06-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MEREL P. GLAUBIGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY REMY WEILAND, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLAUBIGER, MEREL P RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $7,181.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,256.00, SEE ATTACHMENT: STATEMENT OF DECISION ENCLOSED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
